compiled_state.title: Remove obsolete test_design_wireframe_skill_references_script from test-resolve-stack-adapter.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Remove lines 39-45 (test_design_wireframe_skill_references_script) and line 17 (DESIGN_WIREFRAME_SKILL variable) from tests/scripts/test-resolve-stack-adapter.sh.

The removed test checks that design-wireframe/SKILL.md grep-matches 'resolve-stack-adapter.sh'. Once story 9b7f-64c0 replaces SKILL.md with a redirect stub, this test permanently fails. The variable on line 17 is only used by this test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Lines 39-45 (test_design_wireframe_skill_references_script block) are removed
- Line 17 (DESIGN_WIREFRAME_SKILL variable declaration) is removed
- test-resolve-stack-adapter.sh passes against the stub-based design-wireframe/SKILL.md
- No other test assertions in the file are affected

## testing_mode: GREEN
Source behavior (stub does not reference resolve-stack-adapter.sh) already implemented by 9b7f-64c0 before this task runs.
